en: “The dead were connected to the living through weeping.” The earthquake that struck China in January 1556 is considered the most fatal in history. Nevertheless, it has left hardly any traces in the tradition. The help that Emperor Jiajing came up with was hardly worth mentioning.

en: What if it shakes?: Climbing tour on a skyscraper in the middle of an earthquake zone. Alex Honnold's attempt to climb unsecured what was once the tallest building in the world was postponed at the last minute due to rain. But it's not just the weather that is a factor of uncertainty locally.
la: Quid si quatiat?: Scandere in skyscraper in medio terrae motu. Alex Honnold temptavit securum ascendere quod olim longissimi aedificium in mundo fuit novissimo momento ob pluviam dilata est. Sed tempestas non solum est factor incerti loci.

en: Balance sheet for 2025: 130 earthquakes counted in Hesse. An earthquake in Taunusstein in October was the largest tremor recorded in Hesse last year. But there were also a few cups shaking in the cupboard in the Odenwald and Hintertaunus.
